attrs.name: FIFO Ordering: Data shall be read in the same orde
attrs.description: FIFO Ordering: Data shall be read in the same order it was written (first-in-first-out). Verify by writing known sequence and reading back in order.

attrs.name: Full Flag: The full flag shall be asserted when FI
attrs.description: Full Flag: The full flag shall be asserted when FIFO contains DEPTH entries and shall prevent further writes (unless simultaneous read).

attrs.name: Empty Flag: The empty flag shall be asserted when
attrs.description: Empty Flag: The empty flag shall be asserted when FIFO contains 0 entries and shall prevent further reads (unless simultaneous write).

attrs.name: Write When Full: Write operations shall be ignored
attrs.description: Write When Full: Write operations shall be ignored when full is asserted unless there is a simultaneous read operation.

attrs.name: Read When Empty: Read operations shall be ignored
attrs.description: Read When Empty: Read operations shall be ignored when empty is asserted unless there is a simultaneous write operation.

attrs.name: Count Accuracy: The count signal shall accurately
attrs.description: Count Accuracy: The count signal shall accurately reflect the number of entries in the FIFO at all times (0 to DEPTH).

attrs.name: Almost Full: The almost_full flag shall be asserte
attrs.description: Almost Full: The almost_full flag shall be asserted when count equals (DEPTH-1) and deasserted otherwise.

attrs.name: Almost Empty: The almost_empty flag shall be asser
attrs.description: Almost Empty: The almost_empty flag shall be asserted when count equals 1 and deasserted otherwise.

attrs.name: Simultaneous Operations: When wr_en and rd_en are
attrs.description: Simultaneous Operations: When wr_en and rd_en are both asserted: (a) If FIFO is empty, perform write only; (b) If FIFO is full, perform read only; (c) Otherwise, perform both operations.

attrs.name: Reset Behavior: Upon rst_n assertion, FIFO shall b
attrs.description: Reset Behavior: Upon rst_n assertion, FIFO shall be cleared, empty=1, full=0, count=0, and all pointers reset to 0.

attrs.name: Synchronous Outputs: All outputs shall be synchron
attrs.description: Synchronous Outputs: All outputs shall be synchronous to the rising edge of clk with no combinational paths from inputs to outputs.

attrs.name: Data Integrity: Data shall not be corrupted during
attrs.description: Data Integrity: Data shall not be corrupted during storage or retrieval. Each write must be readable exactly once with correct value.

attrs.name: Pointer Wraparound: Read and write pointers shall
attrs.description: Pointer Wraparound: Read and write pointers shall correctly wrap around from (DEPTH-1) to 0 without data loss or corruption.

attrs.name: Flag Mutual Exclusion: Full and empty flags shall
attrs.description: Flag Mutual Exclusion: Full and empty flags shall never be asserted simultaneously except during reset.

attrs.name: Count Bounds: Count shall never exceed DEPTH or go
attrs.description: Count Bounds: Count shall never exceed DEPTH or go below 0. Count transitions shall be +1, -1, or 0 per cycle.

attrs.name: Back-to-Back Operations: FIFO shall support back-t
attrs.description: Back-to-Back Operations: FIFO shall support back-to-back write and read operations without requiring idle cycles.

attrs.name: Flag Timing: Status flags (full, empty, almost_ful
attrs.description: Flag Timing: Status flags (full, empty, almost_full, almost_empty) shall update on the same clock cycle as the count changes.

attrs.name: Read Data Stability: rd_data shall remain stable w
attrs.description: Read Data Stability: rd_data shall remain stable when empty is asserted and no write occurs, or shall update to next valid entry on read.

attrs.name: Parameterization: FIFO shall function correctly fo
attrs.description: Parameterization: FIFO shall function correctly for any DATA_WIDTH >= 1 and DEPTH >= 2.

attrs.name: Power-On State: After power-on and reset release,
attrs.description: Power-On State: After power-on and reset release, FIFO shall be in empty state with count=0.

attrs.name: Write to Full FIFO: Verify writes are ignored when
attrs.description: Write to Full FIFO: Verify writes are ignored when full flag is asserted, no data corruption occurs, and count remains at DEPTH.
attrs.how_to_test: Fill FIFO to capacity, attempt additional writes while monitoring full flag, verify count stays at DEPTH and no pointers advance. Read back all data to verify integrity.

attrs.name: Read from Empty FIFO: Verify reads are ignored whe
attrs.description: Read from Empty FIFO: Verify reads are ignored when empty flag is asserted, rd_data remains stable or shows last valid data, and count remains at 0.
attrs.how_to_test: Empty FIFO completely, attempt additional reads while monitoring empty flag, verify count stays at 0, rd_data doesn't change, and no pointers advance.

attrs.name: Simultaneous R/W When Full: Verify that simultaneo
attrs.description: Simultaneous R/W When Full: Verify that simultaneous read/write when full performs only read operation, count decrements to DEPTH-1, and full flag deasserts.
attrs.how_to_test: Fill FIFO to capacity, assert both wr_en and rd_en simultaneously, verify only read occurs (count=DEPTH-1), write data is ignored, and full flag clears.

attrs.name: Simultaneous R/W When Empty: Verify that simultane
attrs.description: Simultaneous R/W When Empty: Verify that simultaneous read/write when empty performs only write operation, count increments to 1, and empty flag deasserts.
attrs.how_to_test: Empty FIFO completely, assert both wr_en and rd_en simultaneously, verify only write occurs (count=1), no read data is consumed, and empty flag clears.

attrs.name: Pointer Wraparound: Verify correct behavior when r
attrs.description: Pointer Wraparound: Verify correct behavior when read/write pointers wrap around from (DEPTH-1) to 0, including data integrity and flag accuracy.
attrs.how_to_test: Write DEPTH entries, read DEPTH entries (forcing wraparound), write DEPTH more entries, read all back. Verify data integrity across wraparound boundary and flag correctness.

attrs.name: Rapid Fill/Empty Cycles: Verify stability during r
attrs.description: Rapid Fill/Empty Cycles: Verify stability during rapid transitions between full and empty states without intermediate stable states.
attrs.how_to_test: Alternate between filling FIFO completely and emptying it completely in rapid succession. Monitor for flag glitches, count errors, or data corruption.

attrs.name: Single Entry Operation: Verify correct behavior wh
attrs.description: Single Entry Operation: Verify correct behavior when FIFO has exactly 1 entry (almost_empty asserted, count=1).
attrs.how_to_test: Write one entry, verify almost_empty=1, empty=0, count=1. Read entry, verify transitions to empty. Test simultaneous R/W with count=1.

attrs.name: Reset During Operations: Verify clean recovery whe
attrs.description: Reset During Operations: Verify clean recovery when reset asserted during active read/write operations at various fill levels.
attrs.how_to_test: Partially fill FIFO, assert reset during write operation. Verify all pointers reset, flags correct (empty=1, full=0), count=0. Repeat during read and simultaneous R/W.

attrs.name: Back-to-Back Operations: Verify correct behavior w
attrs.description: Back-to-Back Operations: Verify correct behavior with consecutive write or read operations with no idle cycles between them.
attrs.how_to_test: Perform DEPTH consecutive writes without gaps, verify all data stored correctly. Perform DEPTH consecutive reads, verify all data retrieved in order. Test mixed back-to-back R/W.

attrs.name: Data Patterns: Verify integrity with various data
attrs.description: Data Patterns: Verify integrity with various data patterns including all 0s, all 1s, random data, walking 1s, walking 0s, and alternating patterns.
attrs.how_to_test: Write each pattern type to FIFO, read back and compare. Test patterns at various fill levels. Verify no bit corruption or pattern-dependent failures.

attrs.name: Almost Full Boundary: Verify almost_full flag beha
attrs.description: Almost Full Boundary: Verify almost_full flag behavior at count=DEPTH-2 to DEPTH-1 transition and back.
attrs.how_to_test: Fill FIFO to DEPTH-2 entries, verify almost_full=0. Write one more (count=DEPTH-1), verify almost_full=1. Write/read to test transitions around this boundary.

attrs.name: Almost Empty Boundary: Verify almost_empty flag be
attrs.description: Almost Empty Boundary: Verify almost_empty flag behavior at count=1 to 2 transition and back.
attrs.how_to_test: Write 2 entries, verify almost_empty=0. Read one (count=1), verify almost_empty=1. Write/read to test transitions around this boundary.

attrs.name: Minimum Depth FIFO: Verify correct operation with
attrs.description: Minimum Depth FIFO: Verify correct operation with DEPTH=2 (minimum practical depth) where almost_full and full are adjacent states.
attrs.how_to_test: Instantiate FIFO with DEPTH=2, verify all operations, flags, and corner cases work correctly with minimal depth.

attrs.name: Maximum Data Width: Verify correct operation with
attrs.description: Maximum Data Width: Verify correct operation with large DATA_WIDTH values (e.g., 128, 256 bits) to test memory array implementation.
attrs.how_to_test: Instantiate FIFO with DATA_WIDTH=128 or 256, perform full test suite, verify no width-related issues in storage or retrieval.

attrs.name: Pointer Collision: Verify correct behavior when re
attrs.description: Pointer Collision: Verify correct behavior when read and write pointers are equal in both empty and full conditions.
attrs.how_to_test: Monitor internal pointers. When empty (pointers equal), verify empty=1. Fill to full (pointers equal again), verify full=1. Ensure correct differentiation.

attrs.name: Count Increment/Decrement: Verify count correctly
attrs.description: Count Increment/Decrement: Verify count correctly increments on write-only, decrements on read-only, and stays same on simultaneous R/W.
attrs.how_to_test: Test each scenario at various fill levels. Verify count changes by exactly +1, -1, or 0. Check for off-by-one errors.

attrs.name: Flag Coherency: Verify all flags (full, empty, alm
attrs.description: Flag Coherency: Verify all flags (full, empty, almost_full, almost_empty) are mutually consistent with count value at all times.
attrs.how_to_test: Create checker that validates flag states against count: empty iff count=0, full iff count=DEPTH, almost_empty iff count=1, almost_full iff count=DEPTH-1.

attrs.name: Asynchronous Reset Timing: Verify reset can be ass
attrs.description: Asynchronous Reset Timing: Verify reset can be asserted/deasserted at any point in clock cycle and FIFO recovers correctly.
attrs.how_to_test: Apply reset at various phases relative to clock edge during active operations. Verify clean reset and proper operation after reset release.

attrs.name: Sustained Full Condition: Verify FIFO remains stab
attrs.description: Sustained Full Condition: Verify FIFO remains stable when held in full state for extended period with continuous write attempts.
attrs.how_to_test: Fill FIFO, hold wr_en=1 with rd_en=0 for many cycles. Verify full flag stays asserted, count stays at DEPTH, no overflow or corruption.

attrs.name: Sustained Empty Condition: Verify FIFO remains sta
attrs.description: Sustained Empty Condition: Verify FIFO remains stable when held in empty state for extended period with continuous read attempts.
attrs.how_to_test: Empty FIFO, hold rd_en=1 with wr_en=0 for many cycles. Verify empty flag stays asserted, count stays at 0, no underflow or rd_data corruption.

attrs.name: Alternating Single R/W: Verify correct operation w
attrs.description: Alternating Single R/W: Verify correct operation with alternating single write and single read operations maintaining steady-state count.
attrs.how_to_test: Write one entry, read one entry, repeat for many cycles. Verify count oscillates between 0 and 1, flags toggle correctly, data integrity maintained.

attrs.name: Non-Power-of-2 Depth: Verify correct operation wit
attrs.description: Non-Power-of-2 Depth: Verify correct operation with DEPTH values that are not powers of 2 (e.g., 10, 17, 31).
attrs.how_to_test: Instantiate FIFO with non-power-of-2 DEPTH, verify pointer wraparound works correctly, count reaches exact DEPTH value, no off-by-one errors.

attrs.name: Simultaneous R/W in Normal State: Verify simultane
attrs.description: Simultaneous R/W in Normal State: Verify simultaneous read/write in normal state (not empty or full) performs both operations correctly.
attrs.how_to_test: Partially fill FIFO (count between 1 and DEPTH-1), assert both wr_en and rd_en. Verify count unchanged, write data stored, read data retrieved, pointers both advance.

attrs.name: Flag Transition Timing: Verify flags transition on
attrs.description: Flag Transition Timing: Verify flags transition on correct clock edge relative to count changes, with no combinational glitches.
attrs.how_to_test: Monitor flag transitions with fine timing resolution. Verify all flags update synchronously with clock edge, no intermediate glitches during transitions.

attrs.name: Stress Test - Random Operations: Verify correct op
attrs.description: Stress Test - Random Operations: Verify correct operation under random sequence of reads, writes, and simultaneous operations at random intervals.
attrs.how_to_test: Generate constrained random stimulus (respecting full/empty conditions). Run for thousands of cycles. Verify data integrity, flag correctness, count accuracy throughout.

attrs.name: sync_fifo
attrs.description: Top-level synchronous FIFO module implementing circular buffer with read/write pointers, status flags, and entry counting

attrs.name: clk
attrs.description: System clock - all operations synchronous to rising edge

attrs.name: rst_n
attrs.description: Active-low asynchronous reset - clears FIFO and resets all pointers

attrs.name: wr_en
attrs.description: Write enable - when high, writes wr_data to FIFO if not full

attrs.name: rd_en
attrs.description: Read enable - when high, reads data from FIFO if not empty

attrs.name: wr_data
attrs.description: Write data input - data to be written into FIFO

attrs.name: rd_data
attrs.description: Read data output - data read from FIFO head

attrs.name: full
attrs.description: FIFO full flag - asserted when count equals DEPTH

attrs.name: empty
attrs.description: FIFO empty flag - asserted when count equals 0

attrs.name: almost_full
attrs.description: Almost full flag - asserted when count equals DEPTH-1

attrs.name: almost_empty
attrs.description: Almost empty flag - asserted when count equals 1

attrs.name: count
attrs.description: Current number of entries in FIFO (0 to DEPTH)

attrs.name: assert_full_flag_correct
attrs.description: Full flag asserted if and only if count equals DEPTH
attrs.sva_template: property p_full_flag; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) full == (count == DEPTH); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_empty_flag_correct
attrs.description: Empty flag asserted if and only if count equals 0
attrs.sva_template: property p_empty_flag; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) empty == (count == 0); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_almost_full_correct
attrs.description: Almost full flag asserted if and only if count equals DEPTH-1
attrs.sva_template: property p_almost_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) almost_full == (count == DEPTH-1); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_almost_empty_correct
attrs.description: Almost empty flag asserted if and only if count equals 1
attrs.sva_template: property p_almost_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) almost_empty == (count == 1); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_count_bounds
attrs.description: Count never exceeds DEPTH or goes below 0
attrs.sva_template: property p_count_bounds; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count >= 0) && (count <= DEPTH); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_count_transition
attrs.description: Count changes by at most ±1 per cycle
attrs.sva_template: property p_count_transition; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count - $past(count)) inside {-1, 0, 1}; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_mutual_exclusion
attrs.description: Full and empty never asserted simultaneously
attrs.sva_template: property p_mutual_exclusion; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) !(full && empty); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_no_write_when_full
attrs.description: Write pointer does not advance when full without simultaneous read
attrs.sva_template: property p_no_write_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (full && wr_en && !rd_en) |=> (wr_ptr == $past(wr_ptr)); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_no_read_when_empty
attrs.description: Read pointer does not advance when empty without simultaneous write
attrs.sva_template: property p_no_read_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (empty && rd_en && !wr_en) |=> (rd_ptr == $past(rd_ptr)); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_count_increment_write
attrs.description: Count increments by 1 on write-only when not full
attrs.sva_template: property p_count_inc; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_en && !rd_en && !full) |=> (count == $past(count) + 1); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_count_decrement_read
attrs.description: Count decrements by 1 on read-only when not empty
attrs.sva_template: property p_count_dec; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (rd_en && !wr_en && !empty) |=> (count == $past(count) - 1); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_count_stable_simul_rw
attrs.description: Count unchanged on simultaneous R/W in normal state
attrs.sva_template: property p_count_stable; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_en && rd_en && !empty && !full) |=> (count == $past(count)); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_reset_clears_fifo
attrs.description: Reset clears FIFO to empty state with count=0
attrs.sva_template: property p_reset; @(posedge clk) !rst_n |=> (empty && !full && count == 0); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_wr_ptr_wraparound
attrs.description: Write pointer wraps from DEPTH-1 to 0
attrs.sva_template: property p_wr_wrap; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_ptr == DEPTH-1 && wr_valid) |=> (wr_ptr == 0); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_rd_ptr_wraparound
attrs.description: Read pointer wraps from DEPTH-1 to 0
attrs.sva_template: property p_rd_wrap; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (rd_ptr == DEPTH-1 && rd_valid) |=> (rd_ptr == 0); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_wr_ptr_bounds
attrs.description: Write pointer stays within valid range [0, DEPTH-1]
attrs.sva_template: property p_wr_bounds; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) wr_ptr < DEPTH; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_rd_ptr_bounds
attrs.description: Read pointer stays within valid range [0, DEPTH-1]
attrs.sva_template: property p_rd_bounds; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) rd_ptr < DEPTH; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_simul_rw_empty
attrs.description: Simultaneous R/W when empty performs write only
attrs.sva_template: property p_simul_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (empty && wr_en && rd_en) |=> (count == 1 && !empty); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_simul_rw_full
attrs.description: Simultaneous R/W when full performs read only
attrs.sva_template: property p_simul_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (full && wr_en && rd_en) |=> (count == DEPTH-1 && !full); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_full_implies_not_empty
attrs.description: If full is asserted, empty must be deasserted
attrs.sva_template: property p_full_not_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) full |-> !empty; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_empty_implies_not_full
attrs.description: If empty is asserted, full must be deasserted
attrs.sva_template: property p_empty_not_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) empty |-> !full; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_almost_full_implies_not_empty
attrs.description: If almost_full is asserted, empty must be deasserted
attrs.sva_template: property p_afull_not_empty; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) almost_full |-> !empty; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_almost_empty_implies_not_full
attrs.description: If almost_empty is asserted, full must be deasserted
attrs.sva_template: property p_aempty_not_full; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) almost_empty |-> !full; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_wr_valid_definition
attrs.description: Write valid signal correctly defined
attrs.sva_template: property p_wr_valid; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) wr_valid == ((wr_en && !full) || (wr_en && rd_en && empty)); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_rd_valid_definition
attrs.description: Read valid signal correctly defined
attrs.sva_template: property p_rd_valid; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) rd_valid == ((rd_en && !empty) || (wr_en && rd_en && full)); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_data_stable_when_empty
attrs.description: Read data remains stable when empty and no write occurs
attrs.sva_template: property p_data_stable; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (empty && !wr_en) |=> (rd_data == $past(rd_data)); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_flag_update_timing
attrs.description: Flags update synchronously with count changes
attrs.sva_template: property p_flag_timing; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count != $past(count)) |-> (full != $past(full)) || (empty != $past(empty)) || (almost_full != $past(almost_full)) || (almost_empty != $past(almost_empty)) || (count == $past(count) + 1) || (count == $past(count) - 1); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_no_overflow
attrs.description: Count never exceeds DEPTH (overflow protection)
attrs.sva_template: property p_no_overflow; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) count <= DEPTH; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_no_underflow
attrs.description: Count never goes below 0 (underflow protection)
attrs.sva_template: property p_no_underflow; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) count >= 0; endproperty

attrs.name: assert_write_increments_ptr
attrs.description: Valid write increments write pointer
attrs.sva_template: property p_wr_inc; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_valid && wr_ptr != DEPTH-1) |=> (wr_ptr == $past(wr_ptr) + 1); endproperty

attrs.name: assert_read_increments_ptr
attrs.description: Valid read increments read pointer
attrs.sva_template: property p_rd_inc; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (rd_valid && rd_ptr != DEPTH-1) |=> (rd_ptr == $past(rd_ptr) + 1); endproperty

attrs.name: cp_boundaries: {COUNT_0_TO_1, COUNT_1_TO_0, COUNT_1_TO_2, COUNT_2_TO_1, COUNT_DEPTH_MINUS_2_TO_DEPTH_MINUS_1, COUNT_DEPTH_MINUS_1_TO_DEPTH_MINUS_2, COUNT_DEPTH_MINUS_1_TO_DEPTH, COUNT_DEPTH_TO_DEPTH_MINUS_1}

attrs.name: cp_corner: {WRITE_WHEN_FULL, READ_WHEN_EMPTY, SIMUL_RW_FULL, SIMUL_RW_EMPTY, WR_PTR_WRAP, RD_PTR_WRAP, RESET_DURING_WRITE, RESET_DURING_READ, BACK_TO_BACK_WR, BACK_TO_BACK_RD, SUSTAINED_FULL, SUSTAINED_EMPTY}
attrs.description: Cover all identified corner cases

attrs.description: Cover reset in various conditions
